category_sources: source_facts.description says Qhull computes convex hulls in n dimensions; official Qhull README lists convex hulls, Delaunay triangulations, Voronoi diagrams, and halfspace intersections.
display_name_sources: Official qhull.org/GitHub README uses Qhull; source_facts.name is qhull.
docs_sources: Official Qhull README lists html/index.htm and http://www.qhull.org/html as documentation and lists the GitHub wiki.
repo_sources: Official Qhull README says Qhull is on GitHub and gives git@github.com:qhull/qhull.git.
tags_sources: Official Qhull README purpose section lists convex hull, Delaunay, Voronoi, halfspace operations; source_facts.executables lists CLI tools.
